# Filtros estrellas SERP (Desktop)

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: msf-h5e-t34.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://es.stayforlong.com/es/city/madrid
2. Click on rating option 1
3. Click on 1-star rating icon
4. Click on 2-star rating checkbox
5. Click on 2-star rating icon
6. Click on 3-star rating icon
7. Click on 3-star rating svg
8. Click on 4-star rating icon
9. Click on 4-star rating icon again
10. Click on 5-star rating svg
11. Click on 3-star rating option
